METHODS OF REDUCING THE AMOUNT OF ACTIVE COMPONENTS ADMINISTERED TO A DIABETIC PATIENT COMPRISING ADMINISTERING AN INSULIN SENSITIVITY ENHANCER SUCH AS PIOGLITAZONE IN COMBINATION WITH AN INSULIN SECRETION ENHANCER

indications.text:
1.1 Monotherapy and Combination Therapy
NESINA is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type
2 diabetes mellitus [see Clinical Studies (14)].
Important Limitations of Use
NESINA is not indicated for the treatment of type 1 diabetes mellitus or diabet...

1.1 Monotherapy and Combination Therapy
NESINA is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in
adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus in multiple clinical settings [see Clinical Studies
(14)].
